pr_text:
## Title: Fix CRC errors in ESM timer initialization due to message length field ordering

### Summary
The ESM (EPS Session Management) timer initialization in the NAS UE layer contained a critical initialization order bug that caused downstream CRC computation errors. Specifically, in `esm_pt_start_timer()`, the `ctx->args->msg.length` field was being set to 0 *after* the message buffer allocation, but before the actual length was assigned. If memory allocation failed, the length field could re
